channel.title: Cadence Report
channel.description: Fresh takes for indoor cyclists and virtual racers.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your trainers in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying trainers project for indoor cyclists — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/Zwift is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the setup community this week.

item.title: The training checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified training purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of platforms
item.description: The most common early stumbles in platforms, and the cheap corrections that fix them for indoor cyclists and virtual racers.

item.title: "smart trainer guide" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about smart trainer guide through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your setup questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the setup questions indoor cyclists and virtual racers keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in training with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest training adjustments that indoor cyclists and virtual racers report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: smart trainer guide
item.description: The persistent myths around smart trainer guide, stress-tested against what indoor cyclists and virtual racers actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your trainers in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying trainers project for indoor cyclists — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.
